'''thalaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headguard|headguard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headguard|headguard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thalaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thælægæth|thælægæth]] || [[word:thælægæj|thælægæj]] || [[word:thælægæsh|thælægæsh]] || [[word:thælægæ|thælægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thalalagath|thalalagath]] || [[word:thalalagaj|thalalagaj]] || [[word:thalalagash|thalalagash]] || [[word:thalalaga|thalalaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalagath|thalagath]] || [[word:thalagaj|thalagaj]] || [[word:thalagash|thalagash]] || [[word:thalaga|thalaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalafgath|thalafgath]] || [[word:thalafgaj|thalafgaj]] || [[word:thalafgash|thalafgash]] || [[word:thalafgaf|thalafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thalagatha|thalagatha]] || [[word:thalagaja|thalagaja]] || [[word:thalagasha|thalagasha]] || [[word:thalagaka|thalagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thalagath|thalagath]] || [[word:thalagaj|thalagaj]] || [[word:thalagash|thalagash]] || [[word:thalaga|thalaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thalagathal|thalagathal]] || [[word:thalagajal|thalagajal]] || [[word:thalagashal|thalagashal]] || [[word:thalagakal|thalagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thalagathatha|thalagathatha]] || [[word:thalagajaja|thalagajaja]] || [[word:thalagashasha|thalagashasha]] || [[word:thalagaka|thalagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thalagathan|thalagathan]] || [[word:thalagajan|thalagajan]] || [[word:thalagashan|thalagashan]] || [[word:thalagakan|thalagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thalagathaoro|thalagathaoro]] || [[word:thalagajaoro|thalagajaoro]] || [[word:thalagashaoro|thalagashaoro]] || [[word:thalagakaoro|thalagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
